name: nightmare-browser
description: AI-first web browser on NW.js — zero CORS, full Node.js, API-steerable, MCP-enabled

scripts.build:mac: npx nw-builder --platforms osx --arch x64,arm64 --buildDir dist/ src/
scripts.build:win: npx nw-builder --platforms win --arch x64 --buildDir dist/ src/
scripts.build:linux: npx nw-builder --platforms linux --arch x64 --buildDir dist/ src/
scripts.build:all: npx nw-builder --platforms osx,win,linux --arch x64 --buildDir dist/ src/
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
